text:
Done! I've successfully removed the Portfolio and History tabs from your swap interface. Here's what was removed:

**From RelaySwap.tsx:**
- Portfolio and History tab triggers (changed from 5 tabs to 3 tabs: Swap, Batch, Revoke)
- All Portfolio and History TabsContent sections (344 lines of UI code)
- Portfolio-related imports (`useMoralisPortfolio`, `useZapperPortfolio`)
- Portfolio and history state variables (`portfolioData`, `portfolioPnl`, `swapHistory`, `isLoadingPortfolio`, `isLoadingHistory`, `expandedChains`)
- `loadPortfolio()` function (193 lines)
- `loadSwapHistory()` function (749 lines)
- All calls to these functions throughout the codebase
- Related useEffect hooks

The app now only shows 3 tabs: Swap, Batch, and Revoke. All diagnostics passed with no errors.
